ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Not(IsNew()), ISCHANGED(Push_To_NetGain__c), Push_To_NetGain__c = TRUE, OR( ISBLANK(Project__c), ISPICKVAL(LegalEntity__c, "") ), OR( TopCarrier__c , ISBLANK( Tenant_Site_ID__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter Project, Tenant Site ID In associated Project and Legal Entity for the Agreement.
